query: Notre-Dame de Paris towers reopening September 2025 Heritage Days booking official

{"query":"Notre-Dame de Paris towers reopening September 2025 Heritage Days booking official","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1804,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.tours-notre-dame-de-paris.fr/en/actualites/reopening-of-the-tours-de-notre-dame-circuit","title":"Reopening of the Tours de Notre-Dame circuit | Towers of Notre-Dame de Paris Cathedral","content":"We are delighted to announce the reopening of the Tours de Notre-Dame circuit on 20 September 2025.
Group bookings are not possible.
From 24 September, in advance of your visit and via the e-ticketing service, you can download "le compagnon des Tours" - your free guide to the tour of the Towers of Notre-Dame."},{"url":"https://www.finestresullarte.info/en/news/paris-notre-dame-reopens-its-towers-to-the-public-with-a-new-tour-itinerary","title":"Paris, Notre-Dame reopens its towers to the public with a new tour itinerary","content":"On the occasion of the 42nd edition of the European Heritage Days, dedicated this year to the theme “Architectural Heritage,” the Centre des Monuments Nationaux is inaugurating a new visit itinerary to the towers of Notre-Dame de Paris from September 2025.
The majestic oak double spiral staircase, designed by architect Philippe Villeneuve and built by the firm MdB Métiers du Bois (Calvados), offers an immersion into the structure of the bell tower.
"The reopening of the towers of Notre-Dame de Paris and the inauguration of their new tour route represent a powerful and deeply moving moment, a source of great joy for the Centre des Monuments Nationaux.
Thanks to the very efficient work of the public institution Rebâtir Notre-Dame de Paris, the cathedral, a universal symbol of Paris and France, is once again a place of shared wonder," said Centre des monuments nationaux President Marie Lavandier.
By Ilaria Baratta - published on 08/07/2026 alle 16:35:41 - 0 Commenti
By Redazione - published on 30/06/2026 alle 19:31:39 - 0 Commenti
By Isabella Ruggiero - published on 02/07/2026 alle 15:30:07 - 0 Commenti
By Federico Giannini - published on 14/07/2026 alle 21:45:34 - 0 Commenti"},{"url":"https://www.cometoparis.com/blog/heritage-days-paris-s1307","title":"Heritage Days 2026 in Paris: Complete program","content":"Jul 11, 2025 — The Heritage Days 2025, which will take place on September 20 and 21, 2025, architectural history. generally open from 9 AM to 6 PM.
Heritage Days 2026 in Paris: Complete program and activities
This 42nd edition will honor the theme of architectural heritage, a great opportunity to explore places often inaccessible to the general public.
Free access: Many monuments, museums, and heritage sites will open their doors at no cost.
For example, to celebrate events, swimming sites and historical places open to the public, thus promoting the discovery of Parisian heritage.
Don't miss the Fête de l’Humanité 2025, an event that promises a variety of artists and family activities.
For more information on dates and artists, check out our article on the Fête de l’Humanité.
Visit Official Websites: For each event, check the official website for reliable information and booking options.
This event, supported by the Ministry of National Education and the Ministry of Culture, offers a unique opportunity for children to discover heritage in a fun and educational way.
Most Parisian museums and monuments, such as the Louvre Museum and the Eiffel Tower, are open every day except Tuesday.
Hours vary, but they are generally open from 9 AM to 6 PM.
For more information, feel free to visit the official websites of the attractions you wish to discover!
This event will take place on September 20 and 21, 2025, and will highlight architectural heritage."}]}

Six years after the fire that ravaged the cathedral and nine months after the nave was reopened to the public, Notre-Dame de Paris Cathedral is reopening its towers. From this Saturday, September 20, as part of the European Heritage Days, visitors will once again be able to climb to the top of the towers, which were completely restored after the fire that ravaged the majestic church in 2019. French President Emmanuel Macron was the first to climb to the roof of the cathedral the day before to celebrate the reopening.","score":0.86136365,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.tours-notre-dame-de-paris.fr/en/actualites/reopening-of-the-tours-de-notre-dame-circuit","title":"Reopening of the Tours de Notre-Dame circuit | Towers of ...","content":"We are delighted to announce the reopening of the Tours de Notre-Dame circuit on 20 September 2025.
